meaning: n.[地质]分界面,接触面,[物、化]界面
examples: The system uses an impressive graphical interface.
The adapter supports outbound mode only for this interface.
In this case, however, my priority was not the batch interface.
Modem and network interface are included, too, along with a really noisy cooling fan.
Simple navigation, texting and e-mail are enabled by a refined user-interface and fast text input.
